'''鈭歴h-k-t''' ('''shakata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fleche|fleche]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-k-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fleche|fleche]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-k-t
|-
! Lemma
| shakata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shakatithi|shakatithi]] || [[word:shakatiji|shakatiji]] || [[word:shakatishi|shakatishi]] || [[word:shakati|shakati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shakatuthuth|shakatuthuth]] || [[word:shakatujuj|shakatujuj]] || [[word:shakatushush|shakatushush]] || [[word:shakat|shakat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shakatuthu|shakatuthu]] || [[word:shakatuju|shakatuju]] || [[word:shakatushu|shakatushu]] || [[word:shakatu|shakatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shakatufuth|shakatufuth]] || [[word:shakatufuj|shakatufuj]] || [[word:shakatufush|shakatufush]] || [[word:shakatuf|shakatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shakatethe|shakatethe]] || [[word:shakateje|shakateje]] || [[word:shakateshe|shakateshe]] || [[word:shakate|shakate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shakatothoth|shakatothoth]] || [[word:shakatojoj|shakatojoj]] || [[word:shakatoshosh|shakatoshosh]] || [[word:shakat|shakat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shakatotho|shakatotho]] || [[word:shakatojo|shakatojo]] || [[word:shakatosho|shakatosho]] || [[word:shakato|shakato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shakatofoth|shakatofoth]] || [[word:shakatofoj|shakatofoj]] || [[word:shakatofosh|shakatofosh]] || [[word:shakatof|shakatof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shakat忙th忙|shakat忙th忙]] || [[word:shakat忙j忙|shakat忙j忙]] || [[word:shakat忙sh忙|shakat忙sh忙]] || [[word:shakat忙|shakat忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shakatathath|shakatathath]] || [[word:shakatajaj|shakatajaj]] || [[word:shakatashash|shakatashash]] || [[word:shakat|shakat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shakatatha|shakatatha]] || [[word:shakataja|shakataja]] || [[word:shakatasha|shakatasha]] || [[word:shakata|shakata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shakatafath|shakatafath]] || [[word:shakatafaj|shakatafaj]] || [[word:shakatafash|shakatafash]] || [[word:shakataf|shakataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shakatasha|shakatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakatasha|goshakatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakatasha|gokishakatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shakatn眉sha|shakatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakatnkn眉sha|goshakatnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakatn眉sha|gokishakatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakatsh毛sha|shakatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakatnksh毛sha|goshakatnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakatsh毛sha|gokishakatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakatrosha|shakatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakatnkrosha|goshakatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakatrosha|gokishakatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakatmusha|shakatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakatnkmusha|goshakatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakatmusha|gokishakatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakatsherasha|shakatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakatnksherasha|goshakatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakatsherasha|gokishakatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakatngasha|shakatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakatnkngasha|goshakatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakatngasha|gokishakatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakatyasha|shakatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakatnkyasha|goshakatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakatyasha|gokishakatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakatyamasha|shakatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakatnkyamasha|goshakatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakatyamasha|gokishakatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakatn眉sh毛sha|shakatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakatnkn眉sh毛sha|goshakatnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakatn眉sh毛sha|gokishakatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakatn眉rosha|shakatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakatnkn眉rosha|goshakatnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakatn眉rosha|gokishakatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakatn眉musha|shakatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakatnkn眉musha|goshakatnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakatn眉musha|gokishakatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakatsh毛n眉sha|shakatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakatnksh毛n眉sha|goshakatnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakatsh毛n眉sha|gokishakatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakatsh毛rosha|shakatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakatnksh毛rosha|goshakatnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakatsh毛rosha|gokishakatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakatsh毛musha|shakatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakatnksh毛musha|goshakatnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakatsh毛musha|gokishakatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakatron眉sha|shakatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakatnkron眉sha|goshakatnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakatron眉sha|gokishakatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakatrosh毛sha|shakatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakatnkrosh毛sha|goshakatnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakatrosh毛sha|gokishakatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakatromusha|shakatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakatnkromusha|goshakatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakatromusha|gokishakatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakatmun眉sha|shakatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakatnkmun眉sha|goshakatnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakatmun眉sha|gokishakatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakatmush毛sha|shakatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakatnkmush毛sha|goshakatnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakatmush毛sha|gokishakatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakatmurosha|shakatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakatnkmurosha|goshakatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakatmurosha|gokishakatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shakat|shakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sh忙k忙t|sh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshakat|hoshakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosh忙k忙t|hosh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshakat|hohoshakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosh忙k忙t|hohosh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉shakat|n眉shakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉sh忙k忙t|n眉sh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉shakat|n眉n眉shakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sh忙k忙t|n眉n眉sh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂shakat|n茂shakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂sh忙k忙t|n茂sh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂shakat|n茂n茂shakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sh忙k忙t|n茂n茂sh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushakat|lushakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lush忙k忙t|lush忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushakat|lulushakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulush忙k忙t|lulush忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishakat|lishakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lish忙k忙t|lish忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishakat|lilishakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilish忙k忙t|lilish忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshakat|koshakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosh忙k忙t|kosh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshakat|kokoshakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosh忙k忙t|kokosh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshakat|keshakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesh忙k忙t|kesh忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshakat|kekeshakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesh忙k忙t|kekesh忙k忙t]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
